name: Chocolate Mousse Torte
recipeIngredient: 1 package 1 layer devil's food cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mix and bake according to directions. Cool for 10 minutes. Remove from the pan and cool completely. Place on a serving platter.
2. Spread the cake with the 1/3 cup ice cream topping. Chill until ready.
3. For the mousse, in a small saucepan melt semisweet chocolate over low heat; remove from heat. Stir in powdered sugar, liqueur, and egg yolks. Cook and stir over medium heat for 2 minutes or until the mixture coats a metal spoon. Remove from heat; cool completely.
4. Beat the first 1/2 cup whipping cream to soft peaks. Stir half of the chocolate mixture into the whipped cream. Pour the remaining chocolate into the remaining whipped cream. Cover; chill until the mixture mounds. Spread onto the cake, within 1 inch of the edge. Chill; covered for several hours.
5. To serve, drizzle the cake with the tablespoon ice cream topping. Using a pastry bag fitted with a star tip, pipe the half cup whipping cream around the cake edge and garnish with raspberries if desired.
